subject: fix(audit): Phase 1 — quick wins from full audit sweep
body:
Fix 6 issues found across rev, aud, and perf audits:

1. LocationSearch.tsx: Fix import typo — SEARCH_SEARCH_DEBOUNCE_MS → SEARCH_DEBOUNCE_MS
   (rev #1: would crash at runtime when user types in search)

2. useTheme.ts: Remove redundant isDark/colors deps from theme effect
   (rev #12, perf #1: effect fired twice per theme change)
   Compute meta color from resolved themeName instead of isDark/colors

3. FuelMapWeb.tsx: Narrow paint effect deps to colors.primary/primaryContent
   (perf #7: 6 GPU paint operations fired on any colors object change)

4. useFuelTypes.ts: Stabilize fuelTypes array reference via serialized ID key
   (perf #5: new array ref on every render caused FilterContext cascade
   re-renders across HeaderFilters, HomeScreen, StationList)

5. usePersistedState.ts: Remove non-null assertion on resolved value
   (aud #1: initialize to defaultValue instead of using resolved!)

6. useSearchModal.tsx: Add type annotation to useMemo for clarity
   (aud #17: memoization is correct — callbacks are stable useCallback refs)

Tags: audit, performance, bugfix, hooks
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-sweep
Semver: patch

title: Phase 1 — quick wins from full audit sweep
